element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player begins as a fish in aquatic environment with foundational movement
Simple melee attack against basic aquatic enemies
Core mechanic: defeated enemies drop meat for character upgrades
Spend evolution points to enhance specific body sections
Gated progression requiring significant effort to defeat
Consume meat, plant life, or selective evolution to heal
Special items granting hints, evolution point bonuses, or temporary forms
Unlocked through evolutionary choices as environments demand new abilities

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Carboniferous Period (World 3: Early Creatures of Land)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Transition from aquatic to land-based movement and body types
Larger, more powerful enemies requiring evolved body capabilities
Mammalian-specific evolutions to survive ice age conditions
Creatures enhanced by alien crystals; primary antagonistic force
Sentient single-celled organism evolved through crystal consumption; final boss

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemies and consuming meat for evolution
Reaching safe map screens between levels
Using crystals for temporary invulnerability or stat boosts
Completing a level and progressing to next era
typical_tension_triggers: Transition to new geological era with unfamiliar body type requirements
Encountering multiple strong enemies in sequence
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension within levels (build through enemy encounters toward boss) with broader escalation across five eras; each world introduces environmental and enemy complexity matching the geological period's evolutionary pressures

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction as fish with basic biting mechanic and simple aquatic enemies (Cambrian/Ordovician)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate increase in enemy complexity during terrestrial transition and dinosaur era; introduction of larger, more aggressive foes; environmental hazards increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant difficulty spike with crystal-corrupted super-enemies; mammalian ice age survival challenges; culminates in final confrontation with Bolbox

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling progression through enemies with meat-based resource gathering, culminating in boss gate for world advancement
Each geological world presents specific evolutionary body options matching historical inhabitants; players must adapt physiology to environment
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Carboniferous (Early Land Creatures) vs. Mesozoic (Dinosaurs) vs. Neogene (Mammals)

notable_level_patterns.description: Primary antagonistic pattern: standard enemies transformed by alien crystals into overwhelmingly powerful variants that dominate local biota
Story progression tied to defeating era-specific crystal-corrupted bosses; Gaia provides context for each geological period's challenge
